summary: Iteration 47: Teen Patti AI game feature testing. Tested all 15 requested features across backend + frontend. All features working correctly. Backend: POST /api/v2/earn/teen-patti-win returns 200 (coins_earned: 40) on first daily call and 400 (already claimed) on second call. Frontend: Full game flow verified - cards deal, hand evaluation, all action buttons (Fold/Call/Raise), AI turn with thinking indicator, 3 rounds, showdown with card reveal, result screen with winner display, Play Again reset, navigation buttons. GameLobby 'Play vs AI' INSTANT PLAY button verified. EarnCoins Mini Games tab shows Teen Patti and Solitaire cards. CardGames hub shows Teen Patti with PLAYABLE badge.

design_issues.screen: EarnCoins Mini Games tab on mobile
issues: Tab labels are hidden on mobile (390px) - shows only icons. This is intentional responsive design (hidden sm:inline). Minor UX: users on mobile cannot see 'Mini Games' label on the tab button, just an icon.

critical_code_review_comments: TeenPattiGame.js: Showdown useEffect does not have a phase guard inside the timer callback (only `if (!g) return g` null check). If Play Again is clicked within 600ms of fold (edge case), the stale timer may fire on new game state - however cleanup function clears the timer when phase dependency changes, so this is safe in practice
TeenPattiGame.js: Game auto-starts in player_turn phase - no need for start button - design is correct per requirements
App.js routing: /games/teen_patti/play route correctly defined BEFORE /games/:gameType - prevents route conflict
v2_routes.py: teen-patti-win uses reference_id pattern (f'teen_patti_win_{user.id}_{today}') for idempotency - correct daily limit implementation
EarnCoins.js: miniGames array correctly includes teen_patti and solitaire at indices 3 and 4
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user. Note: teen-patti-win already claimed today for test user (returns 400 on repeated calls - expected behavior).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teen Patti AI game at /games/teen_patti/play fully working. Key selectors: [data-testid='teen-patti-game'] (game container), [data-testid='btn-fold'], [data-testid='btn-call'], [data-testid='btn-raise'], [data-testid='ai-thinking'], [data-testid='game-result'], [data-testid='play-again-btn'], [data-testid='back-to-games-result']. GameLobby has [data-testid='play-vs-ai-btn']. EarnCoins Mini Games tab is the 2nd tab button (key='games'), click using `.flex.gap-2 button:nth-child(2)`. Mini Games cards: [data-testid='teen-patti-card'], [data-testid='solitaire-card']. Backend /api/v2/earn/teen-patti-win: 200 on first daily call, 400 on repeat. All card game routes working: /games (hub), /games/teen_patti (lobby), /games/teen_patti/play (AI game), /games/solitaire.
